zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Hill於1495年1月10日出生在英國薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Sir William Hill25歲，母親Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham20歲。他於大約1515年與Alicia Somerset Toose在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年3月在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特萊特林頓聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Hill于1495年1月10日出生在英国薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Sir William Hill25岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham20岁。他于大约1515年与Alicia Somerset Toose在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年3月在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特萊特林頓聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Hill was born on 10 January 1495, in Taunton, Somerset, England, his father, Sir William Hill, was 25 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham, was 20. He married Alicia Somerset Toose about 1515, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in March 1546, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Hill est né le 10 janvier 1495, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Hill, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Somerset Toose environ 1515, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en mars 1546, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Alicia Somerset Toose circa 1515, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel marzo 1546, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 리슬링턴 스트 메리 막달레나 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Hill(이)가 1495년 1월 10일 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Hill(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 Alicia Somerset Toose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 3월 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 리슬링턴 스트 메리 막달레나 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hill nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1495, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Hill, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia Somerset Toose aproximadamente 1515, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em março de 1546, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene Church, Writhlington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary Magdalene Church, Taunton, So: ст мэри магдеилин чурч, ритлингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Hill родился 10 января 1495 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Hill было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Somerset Buckingham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Somerset Toose около 1515 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер марта 1546 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилин чурч, ритлингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
